title: Conqueror’s Haki Sweeps the Army
description: On pages 1–5, this part focuses on Hody Jones, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is conqueror’s haki sweeps the army.
scene: The scene follows conqueror’s haki sweeps the army, keeping the focus on Hody Jones, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: The princes are fighting the new fish-man pirates in the Plaza....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've got to get to GYoncord Plaza!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fate of fish-man Island rests on this battle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If the princes are somehow defeated...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In the skies near GYoncord Plaza

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This country will belong to Holy Jones!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We seem to have ourselves quite the audience.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: kyakyahh!! Well, you don't get the opportunity to see someone dying every day!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The army's soldiers! The country's ministers! And the Royal Family!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, there are none left in this country to oppose us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HAAAAHHHH!!! I need to rampage more, zugon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: muhhi!! Put out that fire in your heart!! It'll turn me into dried squid!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What did those filthy pirates do ....?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The princes were completely overpowering them, but then it looked like they swallowed something..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not apologise, my son. The power they use is not their own...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if it allows them to take our country from us ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let's execute them all, Captain Hody!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Give the worthless Royal Family The Horrible deaths they deserve!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Give the people watching a show they'll never forget !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have not yet recieved word from decken's men ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we cannot lure out the princess, there is no meaning to any of this.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't you dare harm our sister, hody!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's no warrior!! What threat is she to you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Prince Mamboshi, do you really think that I am not aware of her power?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That legendary mermaid is the greatest threat of all!!

summary: Conqueror’s Haki Sweeps the Army. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
